title: pnpm v11.0.0: Elevating Package Management Experience

topics.title: pnpm Version Update
topics.summary: pnpm v11.0.0 has been released, although the 'latest' dist-tag still points to v10. Users are advised to update to the latest version using the command 'pnpm self-update latest-11'. This release signifies ongoing improvements in package management.

topics.title: Vue Data UI Enhancements
topics.summary: The recent merge of PR #2647 introduces a smooth path utility from vue-data-ui, enhancing the functionality for generating og images. This update follows a previous pull request and aims to streamline the development process by utilizing existing utilities.
